ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF ZOLLIE KILGORE

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ASST. DISTRICT ATTORNEY FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF ZOLLIE KILGORE
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-07-2005 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612
